title: Purchase and sell temporary water for irrigated agriculture and horticulture
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Purchase and sell temporary water for irrigated agriculture and horticulture demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Undertake preliminary research

pcs.text: Identify the agriculture or horticulture activity and cyclical and/or seasonal water requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the agriculture or horticulture activity and cyclical and/or seasonal water requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the agriculture or horticulture activity and cyclical and/or seasonal water requirements.

pcs.text: Identify rules, risks and limitations that have potential to affect water market
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify rules, risks and limitations that have potential to affect water market?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify rules, risks and limitations that have potential to affect water market.

pcs.text: Determine volume of water, including transmission losses and timing of watering to successfully undertake the agriculture or horticulture activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine volume of water, including transmission losses and timing of watering to successfully undertake the agriculture or horticulture activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine volume of water, including transmission losses and timing of watering to successfully undertake the agriculture or horticulture activity.

pcs.text: Identify existing water reserves, water allocations and determine additional water to be purchased
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify existing water reserves, water allocations and determine additional water to be purchased?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify existing water reserves, water allocations and determine additional water to be purchased.

pcs.text: Identify water product required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water product required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water product required.

pcs.text: Identify eligibility and conditions to purchase water according to regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify eligibility and conditions to purchase water according to regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify eligibility and conditions to purchase water according to regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor water market allocation announcements, product releases, pricing and other announcements that may affect water purchase.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor water market allocation announcements, product releases, pricing and other announcements that may affect water purchase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor water market allocation announcements, product releases, pricing and other announcements that may affect water purchase.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Undertake preliminary research

elements.title: Prepare for water purchase

pcs.text: Research water market and identify water products that are suitable and available in trading areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research water market and identify water products that are suitable and available in trading areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research water market and identify water products that are suitable and available in trading areas.

pcs.text: Undertake risk and cost benefit analyses to determine return on investment associated with proposed water purchase
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake risk and cost benefit analyses to determine return on investment associated with proposed water purchase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake risk and cost benefit analyses to determine return on investment associated with proposed water purchase.

pcs.text: Develop strategy for purchasing water, and sequencing water acquisition if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategy for purchasing water, and sequencing water acquisition if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategy for purchasing water, and sequencing water acquisition if required.

pcs.text: Determine quantity, type and price range of water product required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine quantity, type and price range of water product required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine quantity, type and price range of water product required.

pcs.text: Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to purchase water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to purchase water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to purchase water.

pcs.text: Identify and calculate fees, commissions and other costs related to water purchase
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and calculate fees, commissions and other costs related to water purchase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and calculate fees, commissions and other costs related to water purchase.

pcs.text: Seek legal, financial, agronomical and other specific advice related to proposed water purchase as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek legal, financial, agronomical and other specific advice related to proposed water purchase as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek legal, financial, agronomical and other specific advice related to proposed water purchase as required.

pcs.text: Monitor water market for product releases, pricing and other variables that affect water purchase
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor water market for product releases, pricing and other variables that affect water purchase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor water market for product releases, pricing and other variables that affect water purchase.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for water purchase

elements.title: Purchase water

pcs.text: Select and confirm water product chosen is available, within budgeted price range, and meets specific regulatory requirements for buyer's proposed use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and confirm water product chosen is available, within budgeted price range, and meets specific regulatory requirements for buyer's proposed use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and confirm water product chosen is available, within budgeted price range, and meets specific regulatory requirements for buyer's proposed use.

pcs.text: Select water trading platform and/or broker or method to purchase water, and apply to purchase and use water if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select water trading platform and/or broker or method to purchase water, and apply to purchase and use water if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select water trading platform and/or broker or method to purchase water, and apply to purchase and use water if required.

pcs.text: Check and confirm terms and conditions for sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and confirm terms and conditions for sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm terms and conditions for sale.

pcs.text: Complete water transaction, payment and other regulatory reporting requirements, including options for financing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete water transaction, payment and other regulatory reporting requirements, including options for financing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete water transaction, payment and other regulatory reporting requirements, including options for financing.

pcs.text: Confirm water transaction has been lodged with regulatory authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm water transaction has been lodged with regulatory authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm water transaction has been lodged with regulatory authority.

pcs.text: Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to the water trade, if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to the water trade, if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to the water trade, if required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Purchase water

elements.title: Determine water available for sale

pcs.text: Check balance available for sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check balance available for sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check balance available for sale.

pcs.text: Research current season water outlook and identify possible allocation for new season
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research current season water outlook and identify possible allocation for new season?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research current season water outlook and identify possible allocation for new season.

pcs.text: Identify water pricing and availability trends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water pricing and availability trends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water pricing and availability trends.

pcs.text: Undertake cost benefit analysis to determine whether to carryover or sell water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake cost benefit analysis to determine whether to carryover or sell water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake cost benefit analysis to determine whether to carryover or sell water.

pcs.text: Decide water product and quantity proposed for sale and/or retention
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decide water product and quantity proposed for sale and/or retention?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decide water product and quantity proposed for sale and/or retention.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Determine water available for sale

elements.title: Prepare to sell water

pcs.text: Identify conditions to sell water according to regulatory requirements and confirm water quantity eligible for sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify conditions to sell water according to regulatory requirements and confirm water quantity eligible for sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify conditions to sell water according to regulatory requirements and confirm water quantity eligible for sale.

pcs.text: Develop strategy for selling water, and sequencing water sales if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategy for selling water, and sequencing water sales if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategy for selling water, and sequencing water sales if required.

pcs.text: Undertake risk analysis associated with proposed water sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake risk analysis associated with proposed water sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake risk analysis associated with proposed water sale.

pcs.text: Determine quantity, class and type and price range of water product to be sold
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine quantity, class and type and price range of water product to be sold?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine quantity, class and type and price range of water product to be sold.

pcs.text: Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to sell water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to sell water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to sell water.

pcs.text: Identify and calculate fees, commissions and other costs related to water sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and calculate fees, commissions and other costs related to water sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and calculate fees, commissions and other costs related to water sale.

pcs.text: Seek legal, financial and other relevant advice related to proposed sale water if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek legal, financial and other relevant advice related to proposed sale water if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek legal, financial and other relevant advice related to proposed sale water if required.

pcs.text: Monitor water market for product releases, pricing and other variables that affect water purchase
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor water market for product releases, pricing and other variables that affect water purchase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor water market for product releases, pricing and other variables that affect water purchase.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare to sell water

elements.title: Sell water

pcs.text: Confirm water product offered for sale meets regulatory requirements and is priced competitively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm water product offered for sale meets regulatory requirements and is priced competitively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm water product offered for sale meets regulatory requirements and is priced competitively.

pcs.text: Check and confirm terms and conditions for contract of sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and confirm terms and conditions for contract of sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm terms and conditions for contract of sale.

pcs.text: Commit to sell water, select water trading platform and/or broker or other method to sell water, and list water for sale
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Commit to sell water, select water trading platform and/or broker or other method to sell water, and list water for sale?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Commit to sell water, select water trading platform and/or broker or other method to sell water, and list water for sale.

pcs.text: Accept suitable purchase offer, complete water transaction, confirm payment and other regulatory reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accept suitable purchase offer, complete water transaction, confirm payment and other regulatory reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accept suitable purchase offer, complete water transaction, confirm payment and other regulatory reporting requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm water transaction has been lodged with regulatory authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm water transaction has been lodged with regulatory authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm water transaction has been lodged with regulatory authority.

pcs.text: Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to the water trade, if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to the water trade, if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to the water trade, if required.
